TextView.android:text: What results would you like from this ad?
Choose the action you want people to take when they see your ad.
Ads about financial products and services, employment, housing, social issues or elections and politics
Automatically created and adjusts over time to reach more people interested in your business.
Is this ad about securities and investments with audiences in India?
This ad is about securities and investments.
Choose where you want to show your ad. The more placements you select, the more opportunities you'll have to reach your target audience.
Your ad will continue to run on a daily budget unless you pause it, which you can do any time.
Choose when this ad will end
Your ad will run continuously with a daily budget of ₹89. Actual amount spent daily may vary.
Your ad will run until you turn it off.
By tapping Promote Now, you acknowledge that your use of Meta’s ad tools is subject to our Terms and Conditions.
